name: High Fantasy
description: Epic tales set in entirely fictional worlds, often involving magic, mythical creatures, and the struggle between good and evil.

name: Hard Science Fiction
description: Stories characterized by an emphasis on scientific accuracy and technical detail, exploring the future of technology and space.

name: Gothic Horror
description: A blend of fear and romance, featuring atmospheric settings like haunted mansions, ancestral curses, and psychological suspense.

name: Historical Fiction
description: Narratives set in the past that capture the spirit, manners, and social conditions of a specific historical period.

name: Cyberpunk
description: A subgenre of sci-fi featuring advanced technology contrasted with a breakdown or radical change in the social order.

name: Contemporary Romance
description: Modern love stories focusing on the emotional growth of the characters and the development of their romantic relationship.

name: Noir Mystery
description: Gritty, cynical crime fiction marked by fatalism, moral ambiguity, and hard-boiled detectives.

name: Magical Realism
description: Stories where magic or supernatural elements are woven into an otherwise mundane, realistic environment.

name: Biographies & Memoirs
description: Non-fiction accounts of a person's life, offering insights into their experiences, challenges, and legacies.

name: Utopian/Dystopian
description: Explorations of social and political structures, often warning of the consequences of current societal trends.
